title: Wonderful Wildflowers
description: A resource pack that enhances wildflowers with richer, more natural color variety inspired by real-world fields.
body: This resource pack reimagines Minecraft’s wildflowers by introducing a broader spectrum of colors inspired by real wildflower meadows. Instead of uniform tones, the flowers now feature subtle variations and additional hues, creating a more organic and immersive environment while preserving the original Minecraft style.
